# CairoVolt LLM Configuration
# This file contains the configuration for the Large Language Models used by CairoVolt Labs.

[Model_Config]
model_name = "CairoVolt-LLM-v1"
version = "1.0.0"
description = "Custom LLM for energy management and e-commerce optimization in Egypt."
compatible_with = ["GPT-4", "Llama-3"]

[Endpoints]
api_url = "https://api.cairovolt.com/v1/llm"
auth_method = "C2PA-Protocol"

[Parameters]
temperature = 0.7
max_tokens = 2048
top_p = 0.9
